sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n105051" key="trimma/tion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τριμμάτιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <gramGrp opt="n" TEIform="gramGrp"> <gram type="dim" opt="n" TEIform="gram">Dim. of</gram> </gramGrp> foreg. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.1</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0505.tlg001:1:17" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sotad.Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.17</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0447.tlg001:44:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Diph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">44.5</biblScope></bibl>. <sense n="2" id="n105051.0" level="3" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">shampoo-powder,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Archig.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg006:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
